ldpc_decoder: The fixed 802.11n topology duplicates selector arms for every edge and layer; clean, noisy, max-iteration, clear, and failure vectors exercise the decoder outcomes without reaching every structurally repeated arm.
pfb_channelizer_fft: Migen expands the DIF address and natural-order bit-reversal maps into exhaustive combinational case arms. Every stage and channel is checked numerically in framed co-simulation, but Verilator does not attribute line hits to all constant decode assignments.
